title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: A YouTube video demonstrating how to build a role-based access control event management system using Softr's AI Co-Builder, which generates database structures and automates workflows without requiring reprompts. The video compares Softr with competitors like Lovable and Replit for no-code application development.
